# purupuru

> a warm world of five elements and five guardians · collect, craft, discover

purupuru is the awareness layer of an on-chain ttrpg world built on Solana.
The five wuxing elements (wood, fire, earth, metal, water) anchor identity,
weather, and ritual. Players read themselves into the world through an
8-question quiz, mint a Genesis Stone NFT marking their element, and
appear in a live shared observatory that shows who's joining the world
in real time.

The web surface is bilingual with platform-portable Solana Actions
("Blinks") that unfurl natively in X (Twitter), Phantom mobile, and
Telegram — letting the world begin before the player enters the app.

## surfaces

- [/](https://purupuru.world/): the observatory · live shared canvas of arrivals, element distribution, weather, and day/night theme
- [/quiz](https://purupuru.world/quiz): 8-question wuxing element read · mints a Genesis Stone NFT on Solana devnet
- [/today](https://purupuru.world/today): ambient daily pulse · what element leads today + how many have joined
- [/actions.json](https://purupuru.world/actions.json): Solana Actions registry · maps friendly URLs to API endpoints per the Solana Actions spec

## canonical vocabulary

- **wuxing**: the five-element system (wood, fire, earth, metal, water) that anchors world identity
- **awareness layer**: the live observable surface of the world · arrivals, weather, element distribution
- **Genesis Stone**: the on-chain NFT minted at quiz completion · ties a wallet to an element
- **puruhani**: a player-character in the world · one per wallet
- **Blink**: a Solana Action surface · the platform-portable presentation of a world ritual

## technical

- Network: Solana devnet (hackathon · mainnet post-ship)
- Anchor program: `7u27WmTz2hZHvvhL89XcSCY3eFhxEfHjUN5MjzMY6v38`
- Frontend: Next.js 16 App Router · React 19 · Tailwind 4
- NFT metadata schema: Metaplex Token Metadata · `image` field at `purupuru.world/art/stones/{element}.png`
- Identity: `@puruworld` on X · canonical site `purupuru.world`

## context

Built for the Solana Frontier hackathon (ship 2026-05-11). The full project
operates on the principle that "the game begins before the player enters
the app" — every on-chain ritual is paired with a presentation layer that
makes the world visible in the social feeds people already inhabit.
